creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Actually, I think your patch might be useful to some people. I have linked to it from bug #265254. More tests from different settings are welcome.

In case the patch works as intended, I might be a bit slow to merge it into the ports tree: I am preparing a big update of many gcc ports that will require some time, and it is probably wise to include your patch into it.
